description: Tests and visualizes whether four 3D points are coplanar (lie on the same plane).

examples.expression:
G = g3d(at(4,23), view(30, 30))
cop = coplanar3d(G, point3d(G, 1, 0, 0), point3d(G, 0, 1, 0), point3d(G, -1, 0, 0), point3d(G, 0, -1, 0))
cop = coplanar3d(G, point3d(G, 1, 0, 0), point3d(G, 0, 1, 0), point3d(G, 0, 0, 1), point3d(G, 1, 1, 1))
